reviews.text: I had a very bad experience in this clinic. Everyone was nice and friendly but I question qualification of the doctors that work there. Ours was Barbara Marinho. I came with my daughter who was having fever and sore throat. Doctor only looked at her throat - she didnt check ears, nose, lungs, didnt measure her temperature, nothing. Never had this experience before. Cherry on the top, she prescribed antibiotics with a dosage that doesnt exist. How can a doctor to be unfamiliar what are the existing dosages of a common antibiotics as penicillin? Had to get another prescription. And it all was for 125GBP.

Unfortunately I don’t have a good experience of this clinic. Paid £90 for a first consultation and Dr Caroline didn’t even take my blood pressure. Didn’t ask me about my life, my weight, diet nothing at all.  I was the one that took off my coat and showed her where the pain was coming from. Also made me feel terrible about taking medication, that was actually prescribed by an excellent doctor, that helped me cope with pain even after I told her that I only take one a day which is an amazing extremely low dosage. She seemed more concerned about herself. Not all people that take medication abuse it Dr Caroline! In the end she didn’t even prescribe an alternative to the said medication only a stronger version of Ibufren that actually gives me serious side effects. If only she took the time to ask.
Waste of money and time. I wouldn’t bother.

Unfortunately, I don’t have the best experience of the clinic. The reception is the only good experience.

The first consultation with Dr Flavio Messina was ok. He prescribed me medication that I could have found on the pharmacy shelves. That’s not a problem if it works, but it didn’t. There was no recommendation for a further investigation if the problem persisted.

A blood test was suggested. The nurse needed three attempts. It was not comfortable.

When I came back to know the result of my blood test I had to waiting more than 30 min. The receptionist had to remind Dr Flavio Messina twice that I was waiting for him and he still made jokes with another patient. He was not prepared for my consultation either. This is not what you expect when you are a paying customer and have paid everything in advance.

Friendly is good, but over friendly starts to feel a bit uncomfortable.

On August 14, 2025, at Clínica Messina, I had the worst medical experience I've ever had. After a delay of more than 35 minutes, I politely asked the receptionist Amanda about the estimated time, and the orthopedist Dr. Gabriel Azzini came …

The service from Dr. Priscila was very disappointing. Instead of asking about my health and pregnancy, she kept questioning my personal life. I thought that, being a Brazilian clinic, the service would be similar to what you get in Brazil. …

The clinic itself is good, but it didn't solve my problem. I went with my 3-year-old son who had had a fever for over 2 weeks. He arrived with a fever, flu symptoms, and a lot of coughing, and the doctor simply said he had to have an …

I do not recommend this clinic. The doctor, who was neither Brazilian nor British, said there was no risk of my 2-year-old daughter having parasites. According to him, in England people wash their hands. It wasn't like in Brazil, where …

I had an appointment with the gynecologist at the clinic. She was very attentive, but she prescribed medication that almost killed me. I was bedridden for three days and tried to contact her, but received no response. So I realized they are not trustworthy professionals. Here is my complaint about the clinic and the professional!

A bunch of thieves
You pay for the consultation and then have to pay for a follow-up appointment
The only place I've seen that requires an absurd follow-up fee
And if you don't speak English and want to understand your exams, you also have to pay for the translation
You pay them to refer you to a professional they don't have at their clinic
You go thinking you're going to solve your problems and leave without any guidance
Terrible in every way
For the first time I have to pay for a follow-up appointment in less than 15 days, which is excessive.
I do not recommend this clinic; it was a useless experience, a waste of money and time.

Hello Viviane Laverde,
We would like to kindly ask you to tell us about your experience with Messina Clinic so that we can evaluate and understand your dissatisfaction. We are available to answer any questions. Thank you very much!

Hi Diogo! How are you? To maintain the quality of our service and uphold our commitment to our patients, we would appreciate it if you could provide us with details about your experience at Messina Clinic, which led you to rate us in this way. Your opinion is very important for us to continue offering excellent service and quality. Thank you very much!

Hello Delmy, we hope this message finds you well and healthy. We would love to be able to repair or improve your experience expressed by the 'two stars' left in your review. We are a small clinic and your opinion can greatly help us to … More

Dr. Flavio Messina is a star. He’s kind, skilled, and has always treated me with real care and professionalism. But when I took my wife to the clinic, we were booked with a different doctor. The service was far below what I expected after seeing Dr. Messina. It was a big letdown. With regret, I won’t be coming back. I wish the whole clinic matched Dr. Messina’s high standard.

On the occasions I tried to contact the clinic, I simply never received a response. In my opinion, the first contact is crucial. Unfortunately, I didn't have a good experience. I can't speak about the clinic itself, as I've never used it. I did try, though. 3 stars for customer service.

Dr. Caroline — excellent. Clinic policy — needs revision.

My experience with Dr. Caroline was excellent: an intelligent, up-to-date …
